use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF NON-METASTATIC, CASTRATION-RESISTANT PROSTATE CANCER (NM-CRPC)
TREATMENT IN COMBINATION WITH A GNRH AGONIST OF NON-METASTATIC, CASTRATION-RESISTANT PROSTATE CANCER (NM-CRPC)
TREATMENT IN COMBINATION WITH A GNRH AGONIST OF HIGH RISK NON-METASTATIC, CASTRATION-RESISTANT PROSTATE CANCER (NM-CRPC)
TREATMENT OF METASTATIC CASTRATION-SENSITIVE PROSTATE CANCER (MCSPC)
TREATMENT IN COMBINATION WITH ANDROGEN DEPRIVATION THERAPY OF NON-METASTATIC, CASTRATION-RESISTANT PROSTATE CANCER (NMCRPC) THAT IMPROVES METASTASIS FREE SURVIVAL
TREATMENT IN COMBINATION WITH ORCHIECTOMY OF NON-METASTATIC, CASTRATION-RESISTANT PROSTATE CANCER (NMCRPC)
TREATMENT OF METASTATIC CASTRATION SENSITIVE PROSTATE CANCER

indications.text:
ERLEADA is indicated for the treatment of patients with
• Metastatic castration-sensitive prostate cancer (mCSPC)
• Non-metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer (nmCRPC)
